title: How do i set the ui for settings in item view
excerpt:
right now clicking on settings in my app item view does nothing. 
how do i enable the react UI that gets poped up when we click settings.

posts.author: 123x (Prakash)
posts.cookedHtml:
right now clicking on settings in my app item view does nothing.
how do i enable the react UI that gets poped up when we click settings.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @123x and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

In the configuration of your view feature in your app, do you have settings fields set?

posts.author: 123x (Prakash)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Matias.Monday , yes i figured it out. forgot to update it here.

it is available under each feature settings.

thanks for the assistance.
